key_political_dynamics: NYC housing politics are dominated by City of Yes implementation, individual neighborhood rezonings, and the perennial tension between development and community preservation. Brooklyn has some of the most contested local politics in the city. The effective altruist community is concentrated in Brooklyn and has growing but still nascent political engagement at the local level.
enrichment_notes: Need specific address to determine: city council district, state assembly/senate districts, community board. Location data is skeleton-level.
